title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: BENSON WELLNESS CENTER BENSON POLYTECHNIC HIGH SCHOOL SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, dental hygiene, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 546 NE 12th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Children and youth ages 0-21 Hours: School Year: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Summer hours: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-5pm, by appointment (503) 418-0409 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 418-0409 Main phone Intake (503) 418-0409 Register Other (503) 418-0409 Schedule INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance plans. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: City of Portland SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
